site.title: Coffee Study
site.description: A site for deep coffee learning

home.hero_subtitle: Origins, processing, chemistry, brewing — a systematic journey through the world of specialty coffee
home.section_origins_desc: Diverse flavors shaped by terroir. Explore the geography, climate, farms, and varieties of major producing regions.
home.section_processing_desc: Washed, natural, honey, anaerobic. How processing decisively shapes the cup.
home.section_science_desc: Maillard reaction, extraction dynamics, water chemistry. Understanding coffee through science.
home.section_brewing_desc: Optimal parameters for each brew method. Understand the variables, control your cup.
home.section_tools_desc: Just pick your brewer and cup count. Get the ideal dose, water, and step-by-step instructions.
home.section_cupping_desc: Sensory evaluation based on the SCA protocol. Learn to articulate flavor.
home.section_varieties_desc: From Typica to Geisha. A comprehensive guide to Arabica lineage and flavor profiles.
